title: For, Since, Ago
description: Three time signals that always confuse. FOR + duration. SINCE + starting point. AGO after past time. 'For 2 years / Since 2022 / 2 years ago.'
summary_pt_br: FOR (duração — há X tempo), SINCE (ponto de início — desde X), AGO (X atrás). Regras: FOR + duração (for 2 years), SINCE + ponto (since Monday), AGO depois de expressão de tempo (two years ago). Cuidado: AGO nunca com present perfect.

scenes.text_en:
'I've lived here FOR two years.' (duration)
'I've lived here SINCE 2023.' (starting point)
'I arrived two years AGO.' (counts back from now)
FOR and SINCE go with Present Perfect. AGO with Past Simple.
scenes.text_pt:
'Moro aqui HÁ dois anos.' (duração = for)
'Moro aqui DESDE 2023.' (ponto de início = since)
'Cheguei há dois anos.' (volta do agora = ago)
FOR/SINCE com Present Perfect. AGO com Past Simple.

scenes.title: The rules that never fail
scenes.body_en: FOR + duration: for 5 minutes, for 3 years, for a long time. SINCE + point in time: since Monday, since 2020, since yesterday. AGO + time expression + PAST SIMPLE: two years ago, a long time ago. CRITICAL: 'ago' NEVER with Present Perfect. 'I have arrived 2 years ago' = WRONG. Say 'I arrived 2 years ago' OR 'I have been here for 2 years'.
scenes.body_pt: FOR + duração (for 5 minutes). SINCE + ponto (since Monday). AGO depois de tempo, com Past Simple (two years ago). ERRO GRAVE: 'ago' NUNCA com present perfect. Use 'I arrived 2 years ago' OU 'I have been here for 2 years'.

examples.en: I started 5 years ago. ✓ (past simple, not PP)

exercise.question: Which is correct?
options: I have moved two years ago
I am moving two years ago
exercise.explanation: AGO + PAST SIMPLE. Never Present Perfect.
exercise.hint_pt_br: AGO só com Past Simple. Nunca com 'have'.

exercise.question: Complete: "I have ___ here for ten years."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "I have lived here for ten years."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. (AGO no passado.)
options: I moved here ten years ago.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "I moved here ten years ago."

scenes.title: Life timeline
scenes.pt_summary: For / since / ago com present perfect e past simple.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long have you lived in this city?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have lived here for ten years.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I moved here ten years ago.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long have you been married?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long have you worked here?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have worked here for five years.

scenes.title: Listening story — For, Since, Ago
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Interviewer and a student. Three time signals that always confuse. FOR + duration. SINCE + starting point. AGO after past time. 'For 2 years / Since 2022 / 2 years ago.' Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Interviewer
paragraphs.en: How long have you lived in this city?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I have lived here for ten years.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I moved here ten years ago.

paragraphs.speaker: Interviewer
paragraphs.en: How long have you been married?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Interviewer. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "For, Since, Ago". Three time signals that always confuse. FOR + duration. SINCE + starting point. AGO after past time. 'For 2 years / Since 2022 / 2 years ago.' Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "For, Since, Ago". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'For, Since, Ago'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "For, Since, Ago".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
